description_long: This is a green armored combat vehicle with a prominent, forward-facing cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The body is angular and robust, featuring sloped armor panels for increased deflection and protection. The vehicle rides on a set of six visible road wheels on each side, indicating a tracked undercarriage, though the tracks themselves are not clearly visible. The surface is painted in a worn, solid green with black scuff marks, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The rear of the vehicle has a hatch with a warning symbol, suggesting access for crew or maintenance. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and firepower for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A green armored combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon and sloped, rugged armor. The surface is worn and battle-scarred, with six road wheels per side and a rear hatch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large cannon barrel, sloped frontal armor, and angular turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon, turret, and six road wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back hatch with a warning symbol and the vehicle's angular rear armor.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the turret, cannon, and six road wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; angular panels with visible wear and scuff marks.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid green paint with black scuff marks and weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: One warning symbol on the rear hatch; no other visible markings or insignia.
